ModMetaData.name: RimImmortal - Cultivator Reverence (Local)
ModMetaData.author: Local
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a "Cultivator Reverence" belief to the ideology system for RimImmortal games.
Any ideology can adopt this belief. When active: - All believers show respect toward those with an awakened Spiritual Root (+15 opinion). - Cultivators share a deep bond with fellow cultivators (+20 additional opinion, +35 total).
No negative opinion toward non-cultivators — only respect for those on the path.
Add the belief to your ideology via the Reform Beliefs dialog (Cultivator Reverence > Cultivators Are Revered).
